description: Use this API routine to place the working case in the form of a specified system condition as calculated during a previous run of one of the members of the the AC contingency calculation family. This function retrieves data from a ZIP Archive Ouptut File that was created during the contingency calculation. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.4.0. ierr = getcontingencysavedcase(pathzip, isvfile)

parameters.name: pathzip
parameters.description: Is the name of the zip archive output file. (input).

parameters.name: isvfile
parameters.description: Is the name of an incremental saved case file (.isv file) contained in pathzip. (input).

error_codes.description: unable to pick up the base Saved Case File from the ZIP Archive File.
error opening the Incremental Saved Case File.
error closing the Incremental Saved Case File.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
